title: AgentSoul Unified Health Summary
description: Standardized health summary output for all AgentSoul CLI checkers. This schema is used by companionship_checker, health_check, and entry_detect when --summary-json is requested.

checker_name.description: Name of the checker that generated this summary: companionship_checker | health_check | entry_detect

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp when the check was run

min_score.description: Minimum score threshold provided via --min-score, null if not requested

gate_passed.description: Whether the overall score passed the min_score threshold, null if threshold not requested

exit_code.description: Recommended exit code: 0 = success, 1 = checker error, 2 = gate failed

output_file.description: Path to the full output file if saved, null otherwise

output_format.description: Format of the full output file, null if no output file

description.description: Description of what this check verifies

issues.description: List of issue messages found by this check

recommendations.description: List of fix/recommendation messages for this check
